top3.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
)
AND date <= '2010-02-22'
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (SELECT team_api_id FROM Team WHERE team_long_name = 'FC Lorient')
  AND date = '2010-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
)
AND date <= '2010-02-22'
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
  AND ta.date = '2010-02-22';

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
  AND ta.date <= '2010-02-22'
ORDER BY ta.date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
)
AND date <= '2010-02-22'
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
  AND ta.date = (
    SELECT MAX(date)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE team_api_id = t.team_api_id
      AND date <= '2010-02-22'
  );

SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
  AND ta.date = '2010-02-22';

final.sql:
SELECT buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE team_api_id = (
    SELECT team_api_id
    FROM Team
    WHERE team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'
)
AND date <= '2010-02-22'
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 1;
